heading: Special pay authority for science, technology, engineering, or mathematics positions and positions requiring banking or financial services expertise
label: 3049a Special pay authority for science, technology, engineering, or mathematics positions and positions requiring banking or financial services expertise

children.heading: Special rates of pay for positions requiring expertise in science, technology, engineering, or mathematics or in banking or financial services
children.label: a Special rates of pay for positions requiring expertise in science, technology, engineering, or mathematics or in banking or financial services
A
children.text: establish higher minimum rates of pay; and

children.label: B
children.text: make corresponding increases in all rates of pay of the pay range for each grade or level, subject to subsection (b) or (c), as applicable.

children.heading: Limitation on number of recipients
children.label: 2 Limitation on number of recipients
children.text: For each element of the intelligence community, the number of individuals serving in a position in such element who receive a higher rate of pay established or increased under paragraph (1) may not, at any time during a given fiscal year, exceed 50 individuals or 5 percent of the total number of full-time equivalent positions authorized for such element for the preceding fiscal year, whichever is greater.

children.heading: Treatment
children.label: 3 Treatment
children.text: The special rate supplements resulting from the establishment of higher rates under paragraph (1) shall be basic pay for the same or similar purposes as those specified in .section 5305(j) of title 5

children.heading: Special rates of pay for cyber positions
children.label: b Special rates of pay for cyber positions
A
children.text: not to exceed the rate of basic pay payable for level II of the Executive Schedule under if the Director certifies to the Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and Security, in consultation with the Under Secretary of Defense for Personnel and Readiness, that the rate of pay is for positions that perform functions that execute the cyber mission of the Agency; orsection 5313 of title 5

children.label: B
children.text: not to exceed the rate of basic pay payable for the Vice President of the United States under if the Director certifies to the Secretary of Defense, by name, individuals that have advanced skills and competencies and that perform critical functions that execute the cyber mission of the Agency.section 104 of title 3

children.label: A
children.text: any allowance, differential, bonus, award, or other similar cash payment in addition to basic pay that is authorized under title 10 (or any other applicable law in addition to title 5, excluding the Fair Labor Standards Act of 1938 ( et seq.)) shall also be counted as part of aggregate compensation; and29 U.S.C. 201

children.label: B
children.text: aggregate compensation may not exceed the rate established for the Vice President of the United States under .section 104 of title 3

children.heading: Limitation on number of recipients
children.label: 3 Limitation on number of recipients
children.text: The number of individuals who receive basic pay established under paragraph (1)(B) may not exceed 100 at any time.

children.heading: Limitation on use as comparative reference
children.label: 4 Limitation on use as comparative reference
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, special rates of pay and the limitation established under paragraph (1)(B) may not be used as comparative references for the purpose of fixing the rates of basic pay or maximum pay limitations of qualified positions under or .section 1599f of title 10section 658 of title 6

children.heading: Maximum special rate of pay
children.label: c Maximum special rate of pay
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), a minimum rate of pay established for a category of positions under subsection (a) may not exceed the maximum rate of basic pay (excluding any locality-based comparability payment under or similar provision of law) for the position in that category of positions without the authority of subsection (a) by more than 30 percent, and no rate may be established under this section in excess of the rate of basic pay payable for level IV of the Executive Schedule under .section 5304 of title 5section 5315 of title 5

children.heading: Notification of removal from special rate of pay
children.label: d Notification of removal from special rate of pay

children.text: the head of such element shall provide notice of the loss of coverage of the special rate of pay to each individual in such category; and
the loss of coverage will take effect on the first day of the first pay period after the date of the notice.

children.heading: Revision of special rates of pay
children.label: e Revision of special rates of pay
children.text: Subject to the limitations in this section, rates of pay established under this section by the head of an element of the intelligence community may be revised from time to time by the head of such element and the revisions have the force and effect of statute.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: f Regulations
children.text: The head of each element of the intelligence community shall promulgate regulations to carry out this section with respect to such element, which shall, to the extent practicable, be comparable to the regulations promulgated to carry out .section 5305 of title 5

children.heading: Requirement for reports
children.label: 1 Requirement for reports
children.text: Not later than 90 days after the date of the enactment of the Damon Paul Nelson and Matthew Young Pollard Intelligence Authorization Act for Fiscal Years 2018 and 2019, the head of each element of the intelligence community shall submit to the congressional intelligence committees a report on any rates of pay established for such element under this section.1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: A
children.text: a description of any rates of pay established under subsection (a) or (b); and

children.label: B
children.text: the number of positions in such element that will be subject to such rates of pay.
